description: Official CrossFit movement standards for the most common benchmark and Open movements. Sourced from CrossFit Games rulebook and movement standards videos.

movements.official_standard: Begin from a dead hang with arms fully extended. Pull until chin clearly passes the bar. Kipping permitted unless otherwise specified.

rx_loads_or_dimensions.bar: high enough to hang fully extended without feet touching floor

movements.official_standard: Start from full hang. Pull up until chest clearly contacts bar below the collarbone. Kipping permitted.
Start from full hang below bar. Athlete must transition from below to above bar in one continuous motion, finishing with arms locked out and elbows over bar.
common_faults: Feet pass through plane of bar (must stay behind)

movements.official_standard: Start from hang on rings. Pull and transition to support position with arms fully locked out at top.
common_faults: Kipped through false grip without lockout

rx_loads_or_dimensions.rings: set so feet do not touch ground at full hang

movements.official_standard: Body in straight line head-to-heels at top. Chest must touch ground at bottom. Hand-release variants require hands to lift off ground at bottom.
Hip crease must drop below top of knee at bottom. Hips and knees fully extended at top.
Bar in front rack. Hip crease below knee at bottom. Hips and knees fully extended at top with bar still in rack position.
common_faults: Bar on shoulders not in rack

movements.official_standard: Bar on back. Hip crease below knee at bottom. Full extension at top.
Bar locked out overhead with arms straight throughout. Hip crease below knee. Bar remains over midfoot.
Hip crease below knee at bottom. Ball must hit at or above target line. Catch may be in squat or after standing.
Two-foot takeoff. Hips and knees fully extended on top of box. Step-down or jump-down both permitted unless 'box jump-over' specified.
common_faults: Not landing both feet on box
movements.standards_change_notes: Step-down vs jump-down ruling has varied year to year in Open. Hip extension must be visible on top.

movements.official_standard: Chest and thighs touch ground at bottom. Jump with feet leaving ground at top. Hands clap above head if 'standard' burpee, or jump 6 in over a target.
Rope passes under feet twice in one jump.
common_faults: Foot catches rope (no-rep that rep, continue)

movements.official_standard: Start from full hang with arms extended and feet behind plane of bar. Both feet must touch bar simultaneously between hands.
From full hang, knees touch elbows simultaneously.
Hands inside marked area. Heels in contact with wall at top and bottom. Head touches ground at bottom; arms locked out at top with body in vertical line.

rx_loads_or_dimensions.hand_box: 36 in wide x 24 in tall against wall

movements.standards_change_notes: Strict-vs-kipping spec has varied across Open WODs. Recent years allow kipping unless specified strict.

movements.official_standard: Athlete travels on hands. Distance measured by hand position. Athletes may break and restart unless otherwise specified.
Bar moves from ground to overhead in one motion. May be power, squat, or split snatch unless specified.
Bar moves from ground to front rack in one motion. May be power or squat unless specified.
Bar moves from front rack to overhead with arms locked out and feet returned under hips at top. Push, push-press, split, or squat jerk all permitted unless specified.
common_faults: Feet not returning under hips before lockout judgment

movements.official_standard: Front squat + push press in one continuous motion. Hip below knee in squat, arms locked out overhead at top with bar over center.
common_faults: Bar resting on shoulders not in rack

movements.official_standard: Bar starts on ground. Hips and knees fully extended at top with shoulders behind bar. Arms straight throughout.
common_faults: Hyperextension finish required - actual fault is incomplete extension
Bar not returned fully to ground (touch-and-go OK if both plates touch)

movements.official_standard: Wide stance. Bar pulled to chin with elbows above hands. Full hip and knee extension at top.
KB starts between legs in hike position. KB swings to fully overhead with arms straight. Russian swing = chest height instead.

rx_loads_or_dimensions.male: 1.5 pood (53 lb) standard, 2 pood (70 lb) heavy
rx_loads_or_dimensions.female: 1 pood (35 lb) standard, 1.5 pood (53 lb) heavy

movements.official_standard: Hips at edge of pad. Touch ground/floor behind head with hands at full extension; touch toes/feet at full flexion.
Climb from ground (or seated start) to mark at top of rope (typically 15 ft). Touch mark or pass with hand.

rx_loads_or_dimensions.rope: 15 ft typical, sometimes 20 ft at Games

movements.official_standard: Single-leg squat. Hip below knee at bottom. Non-working leg held straight in front off ground throughout.
common_faults: Working foot heel coming off ground

movements.official_standard: Move sled across measured distance. Style varies by event spec.
Athlete pedals/pumps until calorie target reached. Monitor must show target before stopping.
Rower must show target distance/calories before stopping.
